headline: Is Stagflation Creeping Into the Picture?
summary: GDP data shows an economy that slowed to a crawl in the fourth quarter of 2025 as inflation picked up.

raw.headline: Is Stagflation Creeping Into the Picture?
raw.summary: GDP data shows an economy that slowed to a crawl in the fourth quarter of 2025 as inflation picked up.

headline: Peoria-based business named one of country's most innovative companies
summary: This Peoria-based business has been named to Fortune's list of the most innovative companies in the United States.
